name.label: Site name
name.description: Primary product or site name shown in public surfaces.

shortName.label: Short name
shortName.description: Compact name used where space is limited.

description.label: Description
description.description: Short product description used by public pages and metadata.

logoURL.label: Light logo URL
logoURL.description: Logo used on light backgrounds. Use a local path or an absolute URL.

logoDarkURL.label: Dark logo URL
logoDarkURL.description: Logo used on dark backgrounds. Use a local path or an absolute URL.

faviconURL.label: Favicon URL
faviconURL.description: Browser icon URL. Supports uploaded PNG, ICO, SVG, and other image assets.

homeTitle.label: Home headline
homeTitle.description: Main heading on the public home page.

homeSubtitle.label: Home subtitle
homeSubtitle.description: Supporting copy shown under the public home headline.

footerText.label: Footer text
footerText.description: Small footer line shown on public pages.

contactEmail.label: Contact email
contactEmail.description: Support or contact email shown publicly.

tawkEnabled.label: Enable tawk.to
tawkEnabled.description: Show the live chat widget on the public home page and the support page.

tawkPropertyID.label: Property ID
tawkPropertyID.description: The first ID in the tawk.to embed URL.

tawkWidgetID.label: Widget ID
tawkWidgetID.description: The second ID in the tawk.to embed URL.

tawkSecureModeSecret.label: Secure Mode Secret
tawkSecureModeSecret.description: Secret Key used to sign logged-in visitors. Keep this private.

supportPageTitle.label: Support page title
supportPageTitle.description: Heading shown on the logged-in support page.

supportPageDescription.label: Support page description
supportPageDescription.description: Short guidance shown before the user starts a chat.

supportContactHint.label: Support contact hint
supportContactHint.description: Small note shown near the support channel status.

termsTitleEnUS.label: Terms title (English)
termsTitleEnUS.description: Terms of Service title shown in the English interface.

termsContentEnUS.label: Terms content (English)
termsContentEnUS.description: Terms of Service body shown in the English interface.

privacyTitleEnUS.label: Privacy title (English)
privacyTitleEnUS.description: Privacy Policy title shown in the English interface.

privacyContentEnUS.label: Privacy content (English)
privacyContentEnUS.description: Privacy Policy body shown in the English interface.

termsTitleZhCN.label: Terms title (Simplified Chinese)
termsTitleZhCN.description: Terms of Service title shown in the Simplified Chinese interface.

termsContentZhCN.label: Terms content (Simplified Chinese)
termsContentZhCN.description: Terms of Service body shown in the Simplified Chinese interface.

privacyTitleZhCN.label: Privacy title (Simplified Chinese)
privacyTitleZhCN.description: Privacy Policy title shown in the Simplified Chinese interface.

privacyContentZhCN.label: Privacy content (Simplified Chinese)
privacyContentZhCN.description: Privacy Policy body shown in the Simplified Chinese interface.

termsTitleZhTW.label: Terms title (Traditional Chinese)
termsTitleZhTW.description: Terms of Service title shown in the Traditional Chinese interface.

termsContentZhTW.label: Terms content (Traditional Chinese)
termsContentZhTW.description: Terms of Service body shown in the Traditional Chinese interface.

privacyTitleZhTW.label: Privacy title (Traditional Chinese)
privacyTitleZhTW.description: Privacy Policy title shown in the Traditional Chinese interface.

privacyContentZhTW.label: Privacy content (Traditional Chinese)
privacyContentZhTW.description: Privacy Policy body shown in the Traditional Chinese interface.

toast.signInAgain: Please sign in again before continuing.
